creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 185641
Update cacti to 1.1.19

Update cacti to 1.1.19
This is a bugfix release, no merge-quarterly is required.

Committer: please ignore the portlint messages regarding gettext.  Cacti has its own internal gettext support, so Makefile does not need to pull in gettext.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.19/
